displayProperties.name: Amalgamation Rounds

Aiming down sights for a short period without firing compresses the spread into a single high-density projectile. Damaging a target with this shot marks them.

This weapon deals additional damage to marked targets. Defeating a marked target or landing a precision final blow with an Amalgamation Round grants invisibility and truesight.

displayProperties.name: Glacial Quake
displayProperties.description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis gauntlet. While your Super is active:

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your gauntlet down to create a shockwave that freezes targets and sends out [Stasis] Stasis crystals to freeze additional ones.

[Light Attack]  : Supercharge your Shiver Strike for bonus damage. Sprint through [Stasis] Stasis crystals or frozen targets to shatter them instantly.

[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Unleashes the beast when full, increasing outgoing damage and reducing incoming Solar damage.

displayProperties.name: Blackheart Growth
displayProperties.description: Modifications for your ship's transmat systems, so you'll always arrive in style.

displayProperties.name: Upgrade Masterwork
displayProperties.description: Defeat enemies using Legend of Acrius to unlock this upgrade.

displayProperties.name: Empyrean Cartographer Robes
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Towering Barricade
displayProperties.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

displayProperties.name: Cluster Bomb
displayProperties.description: Rockets spawn cluster bombs upon detonation. Blast radius is increased.

displayProperties.name: BRAVE Hammerhead
displayProperties.description: Equip this limited edition weapon ornament to change the appearance of Hammerhead.

displayProperties.name: King's Wings Entrance
displayProperties.description: Modifications for your ship's transmat systems, so you'll always arrive in style.

displayProperties.name: Light Touch
displayProperties.description: This weapon gains increased reload speed, handling, and aim down sight speed when you are amplified, radiant, or have Devour.
